## nsc auth trust-aws-cognito-identity-pool

Trust a AWS Cognito Identity pool.

```
nsc auth trust-aws-cognito-identity-pool [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --aws_region string      The AWS region to connect to.
  -h, --help                   help for trust-aws-cognito-identity-pool
      --identity_pool string   UUID of the identity pool.
      --tenant_id string       What tenant to authenticate.
```
